issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases such as missing layers or invalid tile IDs.

scenarios.name: Load Tiled JSON map in Phaser with collision and spawn
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses Phaser tilemap basics but reaches for setCollisionBetween/findObject patterns instead of the skill's setCollisionByProperty({ collides: true }) and getObjectLayer + objects.forEach switch on obj.type.

scenarios.name: Tileset with animated tiles and per-tile collision properties
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents flat property names and a frames array, missing the .tsj schema with tilewidth/tilecount/columns at top level, the properties array of {name, type, value}, and the animation array of {tileid, duration} frames.
